Darren,
I need funds for LHW JPMorgan (Bank One) as the balance is approximately 
$250,000.  Please ask Jeffrey if I can transfer 4 mil from Bear Stearns 
Dreyfus.  The balance in Dreyfus is 4,081,365.  This would be the easiest 
way to get the funds asap.
However, the other balances are as follows:
LHW BS Margin   (49,991,177)
WCTRII BS Dreyfus   10,449,594
WCTRII Merrill Lynch    3,671,809
WCTRII Smith Barney 10,031,008
LHW Merrill Lynch   1,557,149

Thanks.
Peg
